name: Abhishek Dash
title: Senior UI Developer
bio: A creative enthusiast with 9 years of experience as a UI Developer. Expertise in Vue 3, GraphQL (Apollo Client), Pinia, and React.js, along with modern JavaScript (ES6+), performance optimization, coding standards, and scalable architectures. Proficient in Node.js, MongoDB, Next.js, Jest, and Happo for full-stack and testing capabilities. Additional experience with TypeScript and modern testing frameworks like Vitest and Testing Library. Working knowledge of Angular. Known for out-of-the-box problem solving skills.
tagline: Out-of-the-box problem solver with strong focus on performance and scalability
